In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a '''battle''' was fought on an [[Unidentified icy planet|unidentified planet]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] as part of the war's [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] campaign. Jedi [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]], [[Voolvif Monn]], and [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]] had been fighting on this planet against a group of four [[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|LM-432 crab droids]], who imprisoned the Jedi via [[Bubble wort projector/Legends|bubble wort projectors]]. However, [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] soon appeared, cutting through the force of droids with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and freeing his commrades from their prisons with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].

==The battle==
In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the final [[Standard year/Legends|year]] of the the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]], [[Voolvif Monn]], and [[Agen Kolar/Legends|Agen Kolar]] participated in a battle on an [[Unidentified icy planet|icy planet]]<ref name="cw22" /> that was part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]] campaign. In the midst of the battle, the Jedi fought against a group of four [[LM-432 crab droid/Legends|LM-432 crab droids]]. The crab droids used their [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] to combat the Jedi, who in turn used their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] to deflect the blasts. One of the crab droids then fired its [[Bubble wort projector/Legends|bubble wort projector]] at Kolar, ensnaring him. Two of the other droids followed suit, trapping Monn and Secura next. However, it was at this moment that [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] appeared, and destroyed one of the droids by cutting off its leg with his lightsaber. Skywalker then [[Telekinesis/Legends|threw]] that leg into the second droid, destroying it as well. After that, Skywalker cut through the remaining two droids and used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to free his fellow Jedi, who cheered at the young Jedi's exploits.<ref name="cw22" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle of an icy planet appeared in the [[Chapter 22 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|twenty-second chapter]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' television series, which aired on [[March 22]], [[2005]].<ref name="imdb">{{IMDb|title/tt0859544|text="Star Wars: Clone Wars" Chapter 22 (TV episode 2005) - IMDb}}</ref> It marked the first appearance of the LM-432 crab droids, which went on to appear in [[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'']]. The droids' bubble weapon used in this battle was later identified as the "bubble wort projector" in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]] [http://www.starwars.com/databank/droid/crabdroid/index.html entry]. A ruined [[Core ship/Legends|''Lucrehulk''-class Core Ship]] is also visible in the background. However, it is not known if it was damaged as a result of this particular battle.
